stimulus: Scholars long believed that pottery first appeared in East Asia about 12,000 years ago, but this view has been ______blank by new archaeological evidence from a cave in southern China that reveals pottery fragments at least 8,000 years older.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice A is correct because "challenged" means to question or dispute, matching the idea that older pottery fragments call the earlier view into doubt. Choice B is incorrect because supporting is the opposite of what the evidence does. Choice C is incorrect because imagining doesn’t describe what evidence does. Choice D is incorrect because explaining doesn’t fit a contradiction.
